title: Create
subtitle: Choose what you want to create

affirmation.name: Affirmation
affirmation.description: Rewire subconscious beliefs through personalized spoken affirmations in your own voice.

meditation.name: Meditation
meditation.description: Guided visualization that drops you into deep alpha or theta states for lasting change.

ritual.name: Ritual
ritual.description: The deepest practice — combining affirmation, visualization, and somatic anchoring.

heading.affirmation: What do you want to change or strengthen?
heading.meditation: What state or outcome are you seeking?

placeholder.affirmation: e.g. I want to feel genuinely confident in social situations…
placeholder.meditation: e.g. I want to release anxiety and find calm clarity…
placeholder.ritual: e.g. I want to fully embody the identity of a successful entrepreneur…

hint.affirmation: Focus on a specific area — confidence, abundance, health, relationships.
hint.meditation: Describe a state you want to reach, not just what you want to avoid.
hint.ritual: Think in terms of identity — who you are becoming, not just what you want.

intent.scienceInsight: Each time you articulate your intent clearly, you activate the prefrontal cortex — the part of the brain responsible for planning and intentional change.

context.heading: Add some context
context.placeholder: e.g. I've always struggled with self-doubt in meetings…
context.hint: The more specific you are, the more personalized your practice will be.
context.scienceInsight: Context helps the AI craft language that resonates with your specific pattern — not a generic script.

script.heading: Your script
script.generatingSubtitle: AI is weaving your intent into language
script.readyToGenerate: Ready to generate your personalised script
script.readyHint: Read through, edit freely, then record in your own voice
script.generateHint: AI will craft a personalised script based on your intent.
script.regenerateConfirm: A new script will replace the current one
script.scienceInsight: The script is a starting point. Editing it in your own words strengthens the neural encoding — your brain responds more powerfully to your own authentic language.

errors.noIntent: No intent found. Please go back and fill in your intent first.

voice.heading: Choose your voice
voice.subtitle: Your own voice carries the highest neural impact — but AI voice is still powerful.

myVoice.description: Hear your own voice — the most powerful form of identity encoding.
myVoice.micPermissionError: Microphone access is required. Please allow access in your browser settings and try again.
myVoice.readScript: Read your script aloud in a calm, intentional voice.

aiVoice.description: ElevenLabs neural voice — clear, warm, and professionally produced.
aiVoice.hint: We'll generate your audio using ElevenLabs' neural voice.

library.description: Use a saved voice — a parent, mentor, partner, or friend.
library.empty: Your voice library is empty. Add voices in the Sanctuary.

voice.scienceInsight: Your own voice speaking affirmations activates auditory, motor, and language processing simultaneously — creating a triple-reinforcement loop that external audio cannot replicate.

orb.title: Orb
orb.intro: I'm your guide. Tell me what you want to create.

errors.insufficientCredits: You need {cost} Qs but have {balance}. Get more Qs to continue.
errors.creditServiceError: Credit service error. Please try again.
